Where We Take You

Handpicked destinations
for adventurers who seek more

From the Gulf shores of St. Pete to the cliffside villages of the Amalfi Coast — every journey is crafted for connection, wonder, and ease.

Sun-drenched waterfront, world-class art, and the Gulf's softest shores — where Discovering Latitudes was born.

The city of light made for the women who love beauty in every detail.

Volcanic peaks, emerald valleys, and black-sand shores — where the soul comes to breathe.

Lemon groves, cerulean waters, and cliffside villages that feel like stepping into a painting.

10+ Years of Expert Travel
Our Origin Story

A journey born from
letting go

When my daughters moved across the Pacific to Hawaii and I stayed in Florida, I found myself letting go of high school clothes, college notes, and little pieces of their childhood — each box carrying a memory.

"I kept telling myself one thing: I am letting go of the old to make room for new experiences. Our trip to Europe reminded me our relationship isn't ending — it's changing."

Now we meet in new places, explore new cities, and build memories as three women discovering the world together. Travel became our bridge across the ocean. Discovering Latitudes was born from that bridge.

50+ Destinations Served
100% Personalized
1 Agent, Fully Dedicated
What We Offer

Every detail, handled
with care

From the moment you dream it to the moment you land home, we handle every layer — so you experience the journey, not the logistics.

Girls' Getaways

3–5 day curated escapes to Nashville, Scottsdale, Miami, and beyond. Designed for laughter, freedom, and memories you'll relive forever.

Mother-Daughter Trips

Paris, London, Rome, New York — shared exploration that deepens bonds and creates stories you'll pass down for generations.

Boutique Group Travel

Intimate hosted escapes for 8–14 women — Amalfi Coast, Christmas markets, Napa wine retreats, Sedona wellness weekends.

Celebration Travel

Birthdays, graduations, milestone moments — we craft trips that honor the occasion with elegance, surprise, and personal touch.

Full-Service Planning

Flights, cruises, transfers, accommodations, tours, activities — complete itinerary design tailored to your interests, desires, and budget.

Ongoing Trip Support

We're with you before, during, and after — ensuring every detail unfolds seamlessly so you stay in the moment, not on the phone.

Free 15-Min Planning Call

Your dream trip
starts with a conversation

Tell us who you're traveling with and what matters most — we'll take it from there.

No generic packages Every trip is built around you — your pace, your people, your priorities.
Stress-free from day one We handle the research, bookings, and logistics — you handle the excitement.
VIP touches included Expert connections, curated experiences, and insider access that transforms good trips into unforgettable ones.
